description:
Visual experiment per user request. Reorder FACE_SECTION_MAP in OctahedronHero.tsx so the two greens (campus, neighborhood) sit on opposite hemispheres and warm tones alternate.

## New order (face index → section)
0: campus
1: events
2: lab
3: people
4: neighborhood
5: story
6: forum
7: school
title: Reorder octahedron FACE_SECTION_MAP to spread greens and alternate warm tones
